description: Input record for recall machinery. Carries subject_agent_id, surface_context (env scope), detail_level (verbosity selector for the matching RecallReceipt), and an Optional requestor_signer_id for consumer-side signing.

request_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this request (UUID v4).

subject_agent_id.description: The agent whose data is being recalled (consumer-coordinated id space).

surface_context.description: Environment selector for recall machinery. Closed 5-member core (public | private | system | demo | test) plus a 3-segment consumer namespace fallback. The combined regex (^([a-z]+|[a-z][a-z0-9]+:[a-z][a-z0-9_-]+:[a-z][a-z0-9_-]+)$) matches either form for cross-runner parity.

anyOf.description: Consumer-public surface; recipient may share the recall publicly.
Consumer-private surface; recipient must keep the recall internal.
System / infrastructure surface (logs, telemetry, internal control plane).
Demo / showcase surface; not an audit-grade surface.
Test surface; never an audit-grade surface.
3-segment consumer namespace: <github-org>:<consumer>:<surface>. Hounfour does not register namespaces; uniqueness is consumer-coordination concern.

detail_level.description: Verbosity selector for RecallReceipt. Three substrate-agnostic levels: minimal | standard | debug. The consumer's audit policy decides what fields populate each level; the library ships only the selector vocabulary.

anyOf.description: Receipt carries only the pack_hash + signature_envelope; no item-level enumeration.
Receipt carries item-level acknowledgment + redaction summary; the default verbosity.
Receipt carries every consumer-side trace point; intended for non-production audit + integration testing.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the request was minted.

requestor_signer_id.description: Optional consumer-side signer-id reference. Hounfour ships shape only; consumer dereferences against its Keyring + verifies any wrapping signature envelope.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this request was authored against.
